title: Tool Choice, Evidence, Actions, and Approval Boundaries · Failure Case: Tool Failure Recovery
summary: Design a tool-using investigation that reads evidence before changing state. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt tool failure recovery increment in a safe tool-use decision protocol. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Handle timeouts, partial results, retries, and alternate evidence without looping blindly.
Require approval for consequential, external, destructive, or authority-expanding actions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
